name: Sequential Thinking - Copilot
description: MCP template to drive step-by-step reasoning and code changes using Copilot-style assistants.

steps.title: Understand context
steps.instruction: Read the repository context and the user request. Summarize the goal in 1-2 sentences and list assumptions.

steps.title: Identify goals and constraints
steps.instruction: List discrete goals needed to satisfy the request and any constraints (safety, no secrets, file edit permissions).

steps.title: Propose plan
steps.instruction: Propose an ordered plan of small changeable steps (1-5 items). Each step should be atomic and reversible.

steps.title: Execute step
steps.instruction: For the chosen step, produce the exact file edits (diff/patch) or code block to apply. Keep changes minimal and explain briefly why.

steps.title: Verify
steps.instruction: Describe how to locally validate the change (tests, commands). If risky, propose a safety rollback.
